title: Donut Chart
description: An interactive donut chart component for visualizing proportional data and part-to-whole relationships with customizable styling, animations, and interactive features.

showcase.title: Donut Chart Showcase
showcase.description: Interactive donut chart demonstrating various features and configurations

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Simple donut chart with basic configuration

sections.title: Custom Styling
sections.description: Donut chart with custom styling options and colors

sections.title: Animation Effects
sections.description: Donut chart with custom animation duration and easing

sections.title: Interactive Features
sections.description: Donut chart with click events and interactive tooltips

sections.title: Size Variations
sections.description: Donut charts in different sizes for various use cases

types.title: AXDonutChartComponent
types.description: Donut Chart Component - Interactive donut chart for visualizing proportional data and part-to-whole relationships

events.name: segmentClick
events.description: Emitted when a segment is clicked

events.name: segmentHover
events.description: Emitted when a segment has mouse hover. Can be used by external elements to highlight this segment

methods.name: createChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Creates the donut chart
 */
createChart(): void

methods.name: updateChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Updates the chart with new data
 */
updateChart(): void

methods.name: cleanupChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Cleans up chart resources
 */
cleanupChart(): void

methods.name: highlightSegment
methods.content:
/**
 * Highlights a specific segment by ID
 * @param id The segment ID to highlight, or null to clear highlight
 */
highlightSegment(id: string | null): void

methods.name: toggleSegment
methods.content:
/**
 * Toggles visibility of a segment by ID
 * @param id Segment ID to toggle
 * @returns New visibility state (true = visible, false = hidden)
 */
toggleSegment(id: string): boolean

methods.name: getLegendItems
methods.content:
/**
 * Returns the data items for the legend
 * @implements AXChartLegendCompatible
 */
getLegendItems(): AXChartLegendItem[]

tokens.name: --ax-comp-donut-chart-bg-color
tokens.description: Background color for the donut chart area and separators between segments

tokens.name: --ax-comp-donut-chart-data-labels-color
tokens.description: Text color for labels and data in the donut chart

tokens.name: --ax-comp-donut-chart-value-color
tokens.description: Text color for value display in the center of the donut chart

types.title: AX_DONUT_CHART_CONFIG
types.description: Default configuration token providing effective AXDonutChartOption values

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltip on hover

props.name: donutWidth
props.description: Width of the donut ring as percentage of radius

props.name: cornerRadius
props.description: Radius of segment corners in pixels

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the animation in ms
